docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUSA, AMER AS TO DEFENDANT ETIHAD AIRWAYS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOUSA, AMER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ETIHAD AIRWAYS $1,127.99 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,172.99, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED HIS CLAIM. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
